_description: Copy this configuration to your Claude Desktop or other MCP client configuration file

_claude_desktop_config._instructions: Add the 'openalex-mcp-server' entry to the 'mcpServers' section in your config file

openalex-mcp-server._comment_option1: Option 1: Run directly with node (requires npm install)
openalex-mcp-server._comment_option2: Option 2: Run with npx (no install required, but slower)

OPENALEX_API_KEY.description: Optional OpenAlex API key for higher rate limits
OPENALEX_API_KEY.how_to_get: Get your free API key at https://openalex.org/register

CACHE_ENABLED.description: Enable/disable local caching of paper metadata

ABSTRACT_MODE.description: Abstract processing mode (currently for future use)
